description: A plain candid color group photograph with no on-image text or design overlays (OCR 'text' is spurious data-table noise). It shows a large gathering of dozens of people, including families, children, and someone in a wheelchair, posed outdoors on a lawn beneath a large tree with multi-story office buildings (a federal complex) behind them. In the center foreground is a table draped with a blue cloth bearing a circular seal (consistent with a Department of Labor / OSHA emblem) holding a floral arrangement; several attendees hold framed photographs of individuals, indicating a memorial/remembrance gathering. This is a documentary event photo for Workers' Memorial Day honoring workers who died on the job, not a designed graphic or meme. Marked is_designed=false: routine candid event photograph.
